## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential SEO and content marketing collaboration between fwd.digital and Abdallah's new company.](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Abdallah's company is rapidly growing but lacks effective digital marketing, especially organic leads](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current $3M spend on content syndication yields poor ROI (1% conversion to meetings)](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Marcel to provide audit and strategy proposal for organic growth by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Both parties eager to move quickly, aiming to start implementation by end of February/early March](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)

## Topics

### Abdallah's New Role and Company Overview

  - [Second fastest-growing cybersecurity company in history](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [6 years old, $300M revenue, aiming for $600M by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [Targeting profitability by summer, metrics ready for IPO](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Rapid hiring, many employees onboarded within last 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)

### Current Marketing Challenges

  - [No digital marketing, brand awareness, or organic lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)
  - [Heavy reliance on expensive enterprise events and paid webinars](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [$3M/year spent on ineffective content syndication (1% conversion rate)](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Approved budgets: $1.8M for paid social, $1.8M for paid search](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Proposed SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Leverage existing glossary content to create topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Develop news-based pages on vulnerabilities and zero-day threats](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Implement AI-driven content creation to align with company's AI focus](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Potential to hire full-time security expert for content quality control](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

### Budget and Timeline Considerations

  - [Marcel to provide crawl/walk/run plans in proposal](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1035.0)
  - [Aiming to start implementation by end of February/early March](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Potential to reallocate funds from content syndication budget](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)
  - [Estimated 15-20% of current content syndication budget for new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=783.0)

### Next Steps and Collaboration

  - [Marcel to conduct audit and prepare strategy proposal](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday at noon](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Possibility of in-person kickoff session at fwd.digital office](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Abdallah to review proposal and discuss internally with team](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to prepare and send audit and strategy proposal](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Abdallah to gather more details on current content syndication efforts](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Monday at noon to review proposal](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
  - [Abdallah to consider involving relevant team members in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Both parties to prepare for potential quick start and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/ogvZYHsTmHSky6X8mGRS6xHdSnmYzi4u?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
